message.content:
Subject: Request Regarding Late Submission

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope you’re doing well. I’m writing to apologize for missing the deadline for [assignment/exam/project] in [course name]. I take responsibility for not submitting on time and understand that this may affect my grade.

If possible, I would be grateful for the opportunity to submit the work late, with any penalties you consider appropriate. If that’s not feasible given your policies, I completely understand.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]  
[Course name and section, if applicable]
